privileged_info_summary: The task optimizes a meeting schedule in Odoo. The target event 'Q2 Financial Review' is initially scheduled for 10:00-11:30 (90 minutes) in Conference Room A, with a 30-minute gap after the reference event 'Team Standup' (9:00-9:30 in Main Conference Room). The goals are verified as: (1) reschedule Q2 Financial Review to start at 9:30 immediately after Team Standup ends, (2) change location to Main Conference Room, and (3) retain 90-minute duration. All metadata values are accurate and reflected in the setup and verification code.
